message:
feat: add comprehensive E2E tests for features specification compliance

Add two critical E2E tests that validate complete feature workflow:
- TestE2E_NodeFeatureWithVersion: Tests real OCI feature (Node.js) with
  specific version option, validating options processing end-to-end
- TestE2E_FeatureLifecycleCommands: Tests feature lifecycle commands
  execute before user commands per devcontainer specification

Implementation fixes required to make tests pass:
- Add IsMerged() and AsMerged() methods to LifecycleCommand to support
  merged commands from lifecycle merger
- Implement executeMergedCommands() in LifecycleExecutor to handle
  sequential execution of feature + user lifecycle commands
- Fix feature path resolution in runner to convert relative paths to
  absolute paths (./local-features/... -> /full/path/...)
- Add containerEnv from features as ENV statements in Dockerfile instead
  of runtime -e flags to properly handle variable references like ${PATH}
- Add WORKDIR /workspace to single-stage Dockerfile generation
- Make install.sh files executable (0755) in createTestProject helper

These tests validate real-world usage of community features with options,
lifecycle commands, and container properties, demonstrating complete
specification compliance.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
